---
title: "Settings"
format: html
---

Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(devtools)
devtools::install_github("p3piit/mlml")
```

Set general parameters for the different models
```{r}
target <- "car"
args_gmert <- list(
    id = "id",
    target = target,
    random_effect = c(),
    max_iter_inn = 50,
    max_iter_out = 10,
    tol = 1e-02,
    cp = 0,
    minsplit = 50,
    minbucket = 20,
    maxdepth = 5,
    xval = 10,
    sanity_check = TRUE
)

args_gmerf <- list(
    id = "id",
    target = target,
    random_effect = c(),
    max_iter_inn = 50,
    max_iter_out = 10,
    tol = 1e-02,
    ntrees = 10,
    mtry = NULL,
    min_node_size = 5,
    max.depth = NULL,
    seed = 1234,
    num.threads = NULL,
    sanity_check = TRUE
)

ctrl <- rpart::rpart.control(
    cp = 0,
    minsplit = 50,
    minbucket = 20,
    maxdepth = 5,
    xval = 10
)

args_rn <- list(
    ntrees = 10,
    mtry = NULL,
    min_node_size = 5,
    max.depth = NULL,
    seed = 1234,
    num.threads = NULL
)

random_effect <- "" 

threshold_subset <- 5
```

Data processing

```{r}


data_model <- data %>%
  mutate(id = user_id,
         car = ifelse(label_track == "car", TRUE, FALSE)) %>%
  select(-event_id,-start_time, -end_time, -label, -label_stop,
  -duration_hours, -durations_secs, -start_day, -end_day,
  -n_labeled_tracks, -user_id, -label_track)
```


Now run the the data with sub_id and split_by_cluster both true and false, the 4 cases


```{r}

analysis_script <- "analysis.R"             

# where to store logs
dir.create("logs", showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---- 4 cases ----
grid <- expand.grid(
  sub_id = c(FALSE, TRUE),
  split_by_cluster = c(FALSE, TRUE),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

run_one <- function(sub_id, split_by_cluster) {
  tag <- sprintf("sub_%s__split_%s",
                 tolower(as.character(sub_id)),
                 tolower(as.character(split_by_cluster)))
  log_file <- file.path("logs", paste0(tag, ".log"))

  # Build environment for this run
  env <- c(
    TARGET = target,
    THRESHOLD_SUBSET = as.character(threshold_subset),
    SUB_ID = as.character(sub_id),
    SPLIT_BY_CLUSTER = as.character(split_by_cluster),
    RANDOM_EFFECT = random_effect
  )

  # Run analysis in a separate R process; capture output+errors to log
  status <- system2(
    command = Sys.which("Rscript"),
    args = c("--vanilla", analysis_script),
    env = env,
    stdout = log_file,
    stderr = log_file
  )

  data.frame(
    sub_id = sub_id,
    split_by_cluster = split_by_cluster,
    status = if (status == 0) "OK" else paste0("FAILED(", status, ")"),
    log = log_file,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Run all cases; NEVER STOP
results <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(grid)), function(i) {
    tryCatch(
      run_one(grid$sub_id[i], grid$split_by_cluster[i]),
      error = function(e) data.frame(
        sub_id = grid$sub_id[i],
        split_by_cluster = grid$split_by_cluster[i],
        status = "LAUNCHER_ERROR",
        log = NA_character_,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  })
)

results
```
